holdings.infoBox: GARP is an equity ETF with a total of 135 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 5.65%, Micron Technology at 5.35%, Apple at 4.63%, Microsoft at 4.45%, and NVIDIA at 4.42%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI USA Quality GARP ETF (GARP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Quality GARP Select index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap growth stocks with perceived quality and value characteristics. GARP was launched on Jun 14, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Quality GARP Select Index
